emails.subject: Haywood
emails.body: Do you have the Haywood file that was in Carlos' office? I need it or a copy of it. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: RE: Haywood
emails.body: RE: Haywood I have my files (that I borrowed from Carlos' office the other day) here with me. For what it is worth, I review Ben's letter and changed it to comport with the requirements of the agreement. Would it be easier for me to send you copies or do you need both binders? To: Zisman, Stuart

emails.subject: RE: Haywood
emails.body: I think it would be a good idea to have the files copied. Kay To: Mann, Kay

emails.subject: RE: Haywood
emails.body: Lorie Leigh has agreed to help me by making a copy of the binder and delivering it to you. It should get to you sometime tomorrow. Stuart To: Zisman, Stuart
